name: dgai-plugins
description: DeepGene plugins for VCEP outreach and research

plugins.name: outreach
plugins.description: Outreach email skills for the DeepGene/VCEP pipeline. Includes outreach-email (generic research-rooted skill) and dgai-outreach (DG context layer with Gene Report offer and VCEP framing).

plugins.name: vcep-research
plugins.description: Generic skill that produces a one-page, fully-cited briefing on a ClinGen Curation Expert Panel or gene: status, chairs, scope, recent ClinVar activity, and three to five linked references. Pulls from the dgai-clingen MCP plus PubMed/ClinVar E-utilities.

plugins.name: dgai-hello
plugins.description: Greeting plugin for testing marketplace installs.

plugins.name: dgai-clingen
plugins.description: MCP server exposing ClinGen panel lookups (lookup_panel, list_chairs) over the public CSpec Registry — no API key required.

plugins.name: dgai-instrumentation
plugins.description: Logs every skill invocation to ~/.claude/dgai-invocations.jsonl. Seed data for the Sprint 4 KPI dashboard.

plugins.name: invocation-log
plugins.description: PostToolUse hook that logs every tool invocation to ~/.claude/dgai-invocations.jsonl.

plugins.name: skill-scout
plugins.description: Sub-agent that searches external sources for existing skills before building new ones. Returns a scored candidate table and a USE AS-IS / ADAPT / BUILD FROM SCRATCH recommendation.

plugins.name: warm-path
plugins.description: Finds the shortest warm introduction path from a seed contact (Bryce, Amanda, Heidi) to any target person in the ClinGen/VCEP network. Reads context/known-contacts.yaml as the source of truth; returns path nodes and recommended intro framing. Requires: pip install networkx pyyaml.
